counters.description: she will just wall you when you snowball :(
her e will also prevent you from releasing your inner demons.
again... interrupting the charge will lower the amount of damage the enemy team takes
he will keep jumping walls or even 1 shot you if fed..
his ulti will stop you when you are charging yours.
she not only has 1 ability to counter you, she has 3. her binding, black shielding herself or teammate and her ulti, which will stun you.
he will just pilar you and you will want to uninstall.
poison pool will stop your snowball dead in its tracks, and she will kill you for looking at her...

synergies.description: only mf you need.
speed + snowball in = 1 shot without the enemy reacting to it.
same as zilean, speed nunu up while he snowballs = 1 shot without enemy reacting.
great gank setup with his taunt. he can also ult you while you engage with snowball.
great gank setup. he will stun, and you hit 'em in the face with snowball.
lots off cc that can help a gank setup as well.
another great gank setup champion, she will pull the enemy back and help you hit the snowball.
great follow up engage. you snowball she follows it by jumping in.
great gank setup. hits the charm, you hit the snowball.
great gank setup, with his cc
potential hook into snowball?!
great first engage. following it up with a snowball = won fight
